user.title: Configure Visayan Electric Service Advisory
user.description: Enter the locations you want to monitor for service advisories. Separate multiple locations with a comma (e.g., Canduman, Jagobiao).

error.no_locations: You must specify at least one location.

init.title: Update monitored locations
init.description: Update the locations you want to monitor for service advisories.

error.no_locations: You must specify at least one location.
